name: partial_async_reset_slice_inference
description: Code should include a register with partial slice reset on async reset and full assignment in else branch, enabling bit-granular FF inference where different slices use $dffe vs $adff
snippet: always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin if (rst) q[3:0] <= '0; else q <= d; end

name: mixed_ff_control_same_signal
description: Code should include a register where different bit slices have different control structures - some bits with enable-only and others with async reset - allowing $dffe and $adff to be inferred separately
snippet: reg [7:0] q; always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin if (rst) q[3:0] <= '0; else q <= d; end
